steps.t: Speak with Doorward Azagâya outside the Shorakhúna in Zajâna about how to locate the Hall of Lajór in Zajâna.
Enter the area outside the Hall of Lajór in Zajâna. The Hall of Lajór can be found across the bridge and up the stairs from the Shorakhúna.
Find and interrogate Jórbol Bóro, Nirjára Bóro, and Akráho Bóro outside the Hall of Lajór.
Return to speak with Mizâdi outside the Shorakhúna in Zajâna with what information you have gathered.
